rawAssistant: Fresh signs on this one road could be trouble. There's a thin layer of mist still clinging to the ground, and I've seen that kind of sign before – usually means something's been stirring in the underbrush. We should keep an eye out for any more signs, especially if there's an old keepsake clue around here somewhere waiting to be figured out.
